evaluations.short_rationale: Practical revision successfully narrows the scope to a more achievable MVP by focusing on ambient soundscapes and removing the 'nonsense speech' element. It retains the core idea of personalized, AI-generated sound environments while making it more concrete for prototyping.

The practical revision maintains the core concept of a simulation game linking skin issues to emotional states, while simplifying the prototype scope to focus on basic treatments and AI-suggested massages. This makes it more feasible to build and test.

The revision refines the core idea by focusing on a QR code linking to information rather than a complex 'hidden catalog' or 'fake scientific names'. This makes the prototype more practical by simplifying the user interaction and information delivery.

The practical revision shifts the focus from a fully interactive AI persona to a more manageable data organization and timeline generation tool. While this improves practicality, it slightly dilutes the original 'ask questions to a digital version of your ancestor' core concept.

The revision retains the core concept of a marketplace for creators' digital assets but replaces the internal token with standard currency for the MVP. This makes the prototype much more practical and easier to implement initially.
